Common.appName: Shri Veer Patta School Fee Admin
Common.school: Shri Veer Patta Senior Secondary School

Defaulters.title: Bakaya anusaran soochi
Defaulters.description: {session} ke liye phone-ready bakaya soochi. Sabse adhik jokhim sabse upar.
Defaulters.officeNotice: Is screen ka upyog keval call aur anusaran ke liye karein. Bhugtan Bhugtan Counter se lein.
Defaulters.filtersDescription: Anusaran soochi ko office team ke liye sankshipt rakhein.
Defaulters.metricStudentsListedHint: Chayanit anusaran filtron se mel khaate vartman vidyarthi.
Defaulters.metricPendingAmountHint: Soochibaddh vidyarthiyon ka kul bakaya shesh.
Defaulters.metricOverdueInstallmentsHint: Deya tithi beetne ke baad bhi apradatt kistein. Neeche vilamb shulk alag dikhaaya gaya hai.
Defaulters.metricOpenInstallmentsHint: Soochibaddh panktiyon mein lambit, anshik, aur atideya kistein.
Defaulters.metricMissingDuesHint: Sakriya vidyarthi jinke bakaaye taiyaar kiye jaane hain, sachche bakayedaar nahin maane gaye.
Defaulters.missingDuesTitle: Vidyarthi jinke bakaaye taiyaar nahin hain
Defaulters.missingDuesDescription: Ye sakriya vidyarthi abhi bakayedaar nahin maane gaye. Vasooli ya anusaran se pehle bakaaye taiyaar karein.
Defaulters.listDescription: Bakaya rashi aur atideya dinon ke anusaar kram — sabse adhik jokhim pehle.
Defaulters.emptyDefaulters: Chayanit filtron ke liye koi bakayedaar nahin mila.
Defaulters.routeTransportDescription: Parivahan anusaran aur route-star milaan karya ke liye yeh drishya upyog karein.
Defaulters.routeTransportEmpty: Chayanit filtron ke liye koi route-vaar bakaya pankti nahin.
Defaulters.routeStudentListDescription: Office call aur atideya anusaran ke liye route-vaar vidyarthi soochi.
Defaulters.routeStudentListEmpty: Chayanit filtron ke liye koi route-vaar vidyarthi nahin.
Defaulters.chipEscalateTitle: {count} lagaataar uttar nahin — badhaane par vichaar karein.
Defaulters.popoverDescription: {name} ke liye sampark prayaas darj karein
Defaulters.popoverSnoozeHint: Yadi nirdharit kiya, to yeh vidyarthi "Is saptah" ya "Sthagit" tab mein chala jaayega.
Defaulters.popoverNotePlaceholder: Jaise 20 taarikh tak bhugtan karenge, kist vivran chaahiye…
Defaulters.logEmpty: Abhi tak koi sampark prayaas darj nahin kiya gaya.
Defaulters.logLoadStatus: Sampark log load nahin ho saka ({status})
Defaulters.voiceNoteUnsupported: Is browser mein audio recording samarthit nahin hai.
Defaulters.voiceNotePermissionDenied: Recording praarambh nahin ho saki (microphone anumati asveekrit?).
Defaulters.voiceNoteLoadFailed: Voice note load nahin ho saka.
Defaulters.voiceNoteLoadStatus: Voice note load nahin ho saka ({status})
Defaulters.whatsappDisclaimer: Is sandesh ko pratilipi karein aur WhatsApp mein paste karein. Yeh app sandesh nahin bhejta.
Defaulters.bulkSendButton: {count, plural, =1 {# abhibhavak} other {# abhibhavakon}} ko WhatsApp bhejein
Defaulters.bulkSheetTitle: {count, plural, =1 {# abhibhavak} other {# abhibhavakon}} ko WhatsApp
Defaulters.bulkSheetDescription: Ek praaroop chunein, poorvaavlokan dekhein, phir har abhibhavak ke liye ek WhatsApp praaroop kholein.
Defaulters.bulkNoTemplates: Koi sakriya praaroop nahin. Admin Tools → WhatsApp templates ke antargat ek banayein.
Defaulters.bulkNoPhoneMessage: {count, plural, =1 {# chayanit abhibhavak ke paas} other {# chayanit abhibhavakon ke paas}} phone number nahin hai aur chhod diye jaayenge:
Defaulters.bulkOpenInfo: Pushti karne par {count, plural, =1 {# naya browser tab} other {# naye browser tabs}} khulega, har abhibhavak ke liye ek. Sameeksha ke baad har ek ko manually bhejein.
Defaulters.bulkOpenButton: {count, plural, =1 {# WhatsApp tab} other {# WhatsApp tabs}} kholein

Exports.title: Export
Exports.description: Vidyarthi, bakaya, anusaran, aur raseedon ke liye Excel files download karein.
Exports.officeNotice: Mobile par, device settings ke anusaar download browser ya spreadsheet app mein khul sakte hain.
Exports.groupChooseHint: Office karya se mel khaane vali file chunein.
Exports.itemAllStudentsDetail: Office jaanch ke liye poorn vidyarthi soochi.
Exports.itemDiscountStudentsDetail: RTE, staff bachcha, aur bhai-behan neeti.
Exports.itemClassWiseDuesDetail: Kaksha kul aur lambit shulk sameeksha.
Exports.itemDefaultersDetail: Lambit aur atideya bakaya ke liye anusaran soochi.
Exports.itemReceiptRegisterDetail: Office khaaton ke liye saheje gaye raseed records.
Exports.itemAiContextBundleDetail: Vidyarthi, kistein, bhugtan, kakshayein, route, chhoot, bakayedaar aur README ke saath bahu-sheet workbook. Badi file — banaane mein 10–20 second lag sakte hain.

FeeSetup.title: Shaikshanik Varsh Shulk Vyavastha
FeeSetup.description: Varshik shulk, deya tithiyan, kaksha shulk, aur parivahan shulk nirdhaarit karein. Sahejne par bakaya svatah samanvayit hote hain.
FeeSetup.topbarSaveAria: Shulk Vyavastha sahejein aur bakaya samanvayit karein
FeeSetup.syncStatusSaving: Saheja va samanvayit kiya ja raha hai...
FeeSetup.permissionNotice: Keval admin Shulk Vyavastha badal sakte hain. Accountant aur keval-avlokan staff vartmaan aur saheji vyavastha yahan dekh sakte hain.
FeeSetup.unsavedNoticePrefix: Aapke paas asahej parivartan hain. Shirsh patti mein
FeeSetup.unsavedNoticeSuffix: click karein taaki bakaya lagu aur samanvayit hon.
FeeSetup.savingInfoNotice: Sahejne par bhavishya ya apradatt bakaya svatah update ho jaate hain. Chukaee ya samaayojit panktiyan sameeksha ke liye surakshit rehti hain.
FeeSetup.academicYearDescription: Is Shulk Vyavastha ke liye varsh chunein.
FeeSetup.testSessionNotice: Yeh ek test shaikshanik varsh hai. Test records mein vaastvik vidyarthi ya vaastvik bhugtan na milaayein.
FeeSetup.advancedYearDescription: Puraane varsh ka rakhrakhav aur saheji vyavastha ka vivran.
FeeSetup.savedSetupFeeHeads: {count, plural, =1 {# shulk mad} other {# shulk mad}}
FeeSetup.noSavedSetupYet: Abhi tak koi saheji vyavastha nahin
FeeSetup.basicDescription: Kist tithiyan, vilamb shulk, aur naye tatha vartmaan vidyarthiyon ke liye varshik shaikshanik shulk nirdhaarit karein.
FeeSetup.installmentDatesDescription: Yeh tithiyan is shaikshanik varsh ki shulk anusoochi nirdhaarit karti hain.
FeeSetup.annualRulesDescription: Bakaya taiyaar karte samay upyog ki jaane vali default varshik raashiyan.
FeeSetup.academicFeeDistributionDescription: Chunein ki varshik shaikshanik shulk kiston mein kaise phailaaya jaaye. Maujooda kist panktiyan is setting se nahin badaltin — yeh naye punarsrijan aur kisi bhi bhavishya ki Shulk Vyavastha par lagu hoti hai.
FeeSetup.firstOnlyOptionDescription: Poora shaikshanik shulk kist 1 mein jodein. Kist 2–N mein keval tuition / parivahan ka hissa hoga. Anushansit — vartmaan school abhyas se mel khaata hai.
FeeSetup.equalOptionTitle: Sabhi kiston mein samaan roop se vibhaajit
FeeSetup.equalOptionDescription: Varshik shaikshanik shulk ko har kist mein samaan roop se vibhaajit karein. Jab abhibhavak samaan bhugtan anusoochi chahein tab iska upyog karein.
FeeSetup.discountsDescription: Manak school chhoot neetiyan configure karein. Vidyarthi assignment Vidyarthi anubhag mein rehta hai.
FeeSetup.discountsInnerDescription: Manak school neetiyan configure karein. Vidyarthi-vishisht anumodan Vidyarthi anubhag se hota hai.
FeeSetup.feeHeadsDescription: Chayanit shaikshanik varsh ke saath saheje gaye atirikta shulk mad dekhein.
FeeSetup.feeHeadsAdvisory: Adhikaansh schools ko saamaanya varshik Shulk Vyavastha mein iski aavashyakta nahin hoti. AY 2026-27 ki shulk ganana ab bhi tuition, parivahan, shaikshanik shulk, aur signed anya samaayojan ka upyog karti hai.
FeeSetup.noFeeHeads: Is satr ke liye abhi tak koi atirikta shulk mad configure nahin kiya gaya hai.
FeeSetup.classesDescription: Har kaksha ke liye varshik tuition shulk darj karein.
FeeSetup.noClassesFound: Koi kaksha nahin mili. School Soochi ya pehli baar Setup se kakshayein jodein.
FeeSetup.advancedClassDescription: Kaksha soochi, sthiti, aur aprayukt panktiyan prabandhit karein.
FeeSetup.tuitionWillSync: Tuition svatah saheji va samanvayit hogi.
FeeSetup.transportDescription: Har route ke liye varshik parivahan shulk darj karein. Yadi school route shulk ka upyog nahin kar raha hai to parivahan khaali chhod dein.
FeeSetup.noRoutesFound: Koi parivahan route nahin mila. School Soochi se route jodein, ya yadi upyog nahin kiya ja raha hai to parivahan khaali chhodein.
FeeSetup.advancedRouteDescription: Route naam, route code, sthiti, aur aprayukt route prabandhit karein.
FeeSetup.routeFeeWillSync: Route shulk svatah saheja va samanvayit hoga.
FeeSetup.generateDescription: Vartmaan Shulk Vyavastha ko sabhi apradatt aur bhavishya ke bakaya par lagu karein. Maujooda bhugtan vali panktiyan surakshit rehti hain.
FeeSetup.generateRecentDescription: Haal ki sameeksha aur saheje gaye runs tab bhi dikhte hain jab naya bakaya update avruddh ho.
FeeSetup.generateRowsRecalculated: {count} panktiyan punah ganana ki gayin. Poorv bhugtan vali panktiyan surakshit raheen.
FeeSetup.generateReasonPlaceholder: Bataayein ki bakaya kyon update kiye ja rahe hain, jaise shulk parivartan ya sanshodhit kist tithiyan.
FeeSetup.generateReasonHelp: Yeh kaaran audit record ke saath saheja jaata hai.
FeeSetup.generateIdlePrompt: Vartmaan Shulk Vyavastha ko sabhi apradatt aur bhavishya ke bakaya par lagu karne ke liye kaaran darj karein aur bakaya update karein.
FeeSetup.generateFootnote: Bhugtan, raseedein, aur bhugtan samaayojan keval jodne yogya rehte hain. Yeh workflow keval bhavishya ya apradatt panktiyon ki punah ganana karta hai aur chukaee itihaas ko yathavat chhod deta hai.
FeeSetup.timeTravelDescription: Kisi chuni taareekh tak ki sakriya shulk neeti aur prati-kaksha shulk ka punarnirmit drishya. Keval padhne yogya; audit_logs se liya gaya.
FeeSetup.timeTravelChooseDescription: Jis din ka nireekshan karna ho use chunein. Prishth audit_logs se neeti snapshot punarnirmit karta hai.
FeeSetup.timeTravelPolicyDescription: Chuni taareekh tak ya usse pehle ki navintam sakriya fee_policy_configs pankti.
FeeSetup.timeTravelPolicyEmpty: Is taareekh tak ya usse pehle koi fee_policy_configs record sakriya nahin tha.
FeeSetup.timeTravelClassFeesDescription: Chuni taareekh tak ya usse pehle prati kaksha navintam sakriya fee_settings pankti.
FeeSetup.timeTravelClassFeesEmpty: Is taareekh tak koi kaksha shulk pankti sakriya nahin thi.
FeeSetup.timeTravelStudentOverridesDescription: Prati vidyarthi navintam sakriya student_fee_overrides. {count} mein se pehle 20 dikhaaye gaye.
FeeSetup.timeTravelStudentOverridesEmpty: Is taareekh par koi sakriya vidyarthi override nahin.
FeeSetup.timeTravelFootnote: {date} tak ya usse pehle {policyCount} neeti audit panktiyan · {feeSettingCount} fee_settings panktiyan · {overrideCount} override panktiyan nireekshit.

AdminTools.title: [HI-EN] Admin Tools
AdminTools.description: [HI-EN] Setup and staff tools. Routine dues sync runs automatically from Students and Fee Setup.
AdminTools.noticeAutoSyncedTitle: [HI-EN] Automatic sync just updated this session
AdminTools.noticeHealthUnavailableBody: [HI-EN] Admin Tools opened, but the automatic health check could not finish. {error}
AdminTools.noticeAutoSyncedBody: [HI-EN] {session} was reconciled automatically. Continue normal work in Students, Fee Setup, Payment Desk, and Transactions.
AdminTools.noticeAutoOnBody: [HI-EN] The app prepares dues after student changes, imports, Fee Setup changes, and selected-student Payment Desk loading. Admin Tools is now only for review and rare setup tasks.
AdminTools.syncReasonAutoUnavailable: [HI-EN] Automatic sync is available to fee setup admins.
AdminTools.syncReasonHealthFailed: [HI-EN] Admin Tools opened, but the automatic health check could not finish. Normal pages remain available while setup is reviewed.
AdminTools.sessionStatusDescription: [HI-EN] This shows whether the selected year is ready for Dashboard, Payment Desk, Transactions, and Defaulters.
AdminTools.qualityDescription: [HI-EN] Read-only guardrails for offline fallback, visual checks, and workflow speed targets.
AdminTools.qualityOfflineDetail: [HI-EN] Payments and receipts still require server confirmation.
AdminTools.qualityWorkflowDetail: [HI-EN] Search-to-student selection budget for counter work.
AdminTools.qualityVisualDetail: [HI-EN] Dashboard, Payment Desk, Students, Reports, and Admin Tools in TEST session.
AdminTools.activityDescription: [HI-EN] Recent staff actions across the workspace. Read-only audit trail for the day-to-day.
AdminTools.activityRecentDescription: [HI-EN] Most recent 100 events first. Older events drop off the feed but remain in the table.
AdminTools.promotionDescription: [HI-EN] Build a per-student preview that proposes next-year classes (Class 8 → Class 9, etc.), apply it once verified, and roll back if needed.
AdminTools.promotionStartDescription: [HI-EN] Sessions follow the format 2026-27 / 2027-28. The target session's classes and fee setup must already be in place.
AdminTools.promotionBuildPreviewHint: [HI-EN] No student records are changed until you explicitly Apply on the next screen.
AdminTools.promotionRecentDescription: [HI-EN] History of previous promotion attempts. Click any run to view its details.
AdminTools.promotionSummaryDescription: [HI-EN] Counts derived from per-student decisions. Review carefully before applying.
AdminTools.promotionApplyDescription: [HI-EN] Once you apply, every promote/graduate entry is committed. Type APPLY in the box to confirm.
AdminTools.promotionApplyHint: [HI-EN] Verify the next-year fee setup is in place. Dues are re-prepared automatically afterwards.
AdminTools.promotionRollbackDescription: [HI-EN] Reverses the class/status changes and undoes credit carry-forward. Type ROLLBACK to confirm.
AdminTools.promotionPlanDescription: [HI-EN] Review each row. Switch decisions if needed.
AdminTools.sessionHealthDescription: [HI-EN] Review each academic year. Missing dues are prepared automatically when Fee Setup is complete.
AdminTools.sessionHealthAutoSyncedBody: [HI-EN] Safe missing dues were prepared automatically. Remaining warnings need Fee Setup or database review.
AdminTools.sessionHealthAllHealthyBody: [HI-EN] Every session has prepared dues and class fee settings.
AdminTools.sessionHealthAttentionBody: [HI-EN] Use Fee Setup for class fee gaps. Manual reconcile remains available only as a fallback.
AdminTools.sessionHealthCardAttentionDesc: [HI-EN] This session needs a dues or fee setup review.
AdminTools.sessionHealthSyncReasonAutoUnavailable: [HI-EN] Automatic sync is available to fee setup admins.
AdminTools.sessionHealthSyncReasonFailed: [HI-EN] Health check could not finish for this session. Normal pages remain available while setup is reviewed.
AdminTools.whatsappDescription: [HI-EN] Pre-canned message templates with placeholder variables used by the defaulters list and receipt sharing.
AdminTools.whatsappNoticeBody: [HI-EN] The app never sends WhatsApp messages on its own. It renders the template with the selected student's data, opens a wa.me link, and lets the staff member review and send manually.
AdminTools.whatsappLibraryDescription: [HI-EN] Templates available to staff for defaulter follow-ups and receipt confirmations.
AdminTools.whatsappEmpty: [HI-EN] No templates yet. Create one to enable bulk WhatsApp drafts from the defaulters page.
AdminTools.whatsappEditorDescription: [HI-EN] Use '{{token}}' placeholders. The app renders these before opening WhatsApp.
AdminTools.whatsappEditorConfirmDelete: [HI-EN] Delete template "{name}"? Active drafts will not be affected.
AdminTools.whatsappPlaceholderFatherName: [HI-EN] Father's name from the student record.
AdminTools.whatsappPlaceholderDueDate: [HI-EN] Oldest due date in DD-MM-YYYY form.
